title: 20 to be shown at Canadian festival
display_title: 20 to be shown at Canadian festival
wikitext:
[]: 2.0 to be shown at Canadian festival             Quote Post by cyharding » Wed Nov 04, 2009 11:48 am Just thought you guys like to know, especially the fans up in Canada. [url]www.animenewsnetwork.com/news/2009-11-04/eva-2.0-musashi-first-squad-to-premiere-in-waterloo[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Nov 04, 2009 12:57 pm Very cool! Too bad I don't live anywhere near there. I wonder if this means the states will show it soon...

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Wed Nov 04, 2009 2:09 pm I was so excited untill i remembered i'm obligated to be somehwere else that weekend....................

[]:             Quote Post by Jesterhead » Wed Nov 04, 2009 2:45 pm hmmm Ontario is only a $150 flight from here. so tempting!

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Wed Nov 04, 2009 10:59 pm this road show needs to head way further south soon

[]:             Quote Post by iain » Thu Nov 05, 2009 10:38 am Oh, this is tempting, it's only about an hour's drive for me. I saw it in Shinjuku in July, but without subs I got lost real fast. The sub-titles should make it a little clearer. ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Heromaster111 » Thu Nov 05, 2009 3:34 pm why does it seem like the US never sees these things here until they be licensed? Kind of annoying. Either way very cool for our Canadian brothers

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Thu Nov 05, 2009 4:12 pm Sadly i might have to skip this one. I live just an hour's drive away but yeah i dont have a car and anyone that can carpool me there. It sucks.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Nov 05, 2009 6:31 pm well, I have already ordered the ticket and found a way to get there by Greyhound from Toronto.........the only problem the first bus to get BACK is the next morning >_________>

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Thu Nov 05, 2009 7:00 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: well, I have already ordered the ticket and found a way to get there by Greyhound from Toronto.........the only problem the first bus to get BACK is the next morning >_________>

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Nov 05, 2009 7:06 pm I wish I could go, have fun to those going.

[]:             Quote Post by tamashii » Fri Nov 06, 2009 12:09 am Dang... i want to go SO badly. Too bad I live on the other side of the country in Vancouver. Anyone know what you need to do to get a film like 2.0 shown in your city at a film festival or something?

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Fri Nov 06, 2009 12:50 am Awesome news but too bad I don't live near by it. I hope a few months we will see some info on it coming to the states.

[]:             Quote Post by Orphan Of Darkness » Fri Nov 06, 2009 3:02 am Too poor to afford the flight. If it comes out West tho I will get on a bus or plane and def see it~
